title: Operation of Accommodations. The requirements for the proper
content: 18 operation of accommodations provided by LMAs or their principals shall be provided by 19 the Department subject to consultation with stakeholders. 20 21 22 PLACEMENT BY THE PRIVATE SECTOR 23 24 25 Verification, Authentication or Attestation of Documents; Accreditation of 26 Principal/Employer; and Enrollment of Ship 27 28
